column5: The plugin slug includes a restricted term. Your plugin slug - "opensalestax-woocommerce" - contains the restricted term "woocommerce" which cannot be used within in your plugin slug, unless your plugin slug contains one of the allowed patterns: "for woocommerce", "with woocommerce", "using woocommerce", or "and woocommerce". The term must still not appear anywhere else in your plugin slug.
